channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Texas agriculture chief criticizes USDA over flesh-eating pest threatening beef supply
item.description: The New World screwworm fly, a flesh-eating pest, was detected in Texas last week for the first time since 1966.

item.title: New narrative emerges blaming China for declining data center popularity
item.description: "China is a common and comfortable scapegoat in American politics, for better or worse," a political scientist told Fortune.

item.title: Healthcare's AI dividend is real; debate centers on who benefits
item.description: Also: All the latest news and watercooler discussions from Fortune.

item.title: Saudi economy shifts focus to domestic priorities after global spending spree
item.description: After a decade of ambitious global investments, Saudi Arabia now emphasizes local development.
